scripts.test:unit: FILES=$(find src -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.tsx' ! -name '*.integration.test.ts' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then bun test $FILES; else echo 'No unit tests found'; fi
scripts.test:integration: FILES=$(find src -name '*.integration.test.ts' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then bun test $FILES; else echo 'No integration tests found'; fi
